TinyBox：深度学习超级计算机现已开售

TinyBox: Deep Learning Supercomputer Now Shipping

2026-03-22

tinygrad 是一个极其简洁却功能强大的神经网络框架。它将最复杂的神经网络分解为三种 OpTypes：ElementwiseOps、ReduceOps 和 MovementOps。

为什么 tinygrad 如此特别？

不同于传统框架，tinygrad 的设计理念是极简主义：

  • ElementwiseOps：一元、二元、三元操作，如 SQRT、LOG2、ADD、MUL 等
  • ReduceOps：归约操作，如 SUM、MAX
  • MovementOps：虚拟操作，如 RESHAPE、PERMUTE、EXPAND

TinyBox：深度学习超级计算机

Tiny Corp 推出的 TinyBox 是一款专为深度学习打造的高性能计算机：

GPU4x 9070 XT4x RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell
GPU RAM64 GB384 GB
TFLOPS7783086
价格$12,000$65,000

Red V2 版本现已发货，Green V2 Blackwell 也在现货销售中。

Tiny Corp 招聘中

公司已获得 500 万美元融资，正在招聘全职软件工程师。查看 bounty page 了解详情。

阅读完整文章：https://tinygrad.org/#tinybox

tinygrad is an extremely simple yet powerful neural network framework. It breaks down the most complex neural networks into three OpTypes: ElementwiseOps, ReduceOps, and MovementOps.

Why tinygrad?

Unlike traditional frameworks, tinygrad follows the principle of minimalism:

  • ElementwiseOps: Unary, binary, ternary ops like SQRT, LOG2, ADD, MUL
  • ReduceOps: Reduction ops like SUM, MAX
  • MovementOps: Virtual ops like RESHAPE, PERMUTE, EXPAND

TinyBox: Deep Learning Supercomputer

Tiny Corp's TinyBox is a high-performance computer designed specifically for deep learning:

GPU4x 9070 XT4x RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell
GPU RAM64 GB384 GB
TFLOPS7783086
Price$12,000$65,000

Red V2 is shipping now, and Green V2 Blackwell is also in stock.

Tiny Corp Hiring

The company has raised $5M and is hiring full-time software engineers. Check the bounty page for details.

Read the full article at https://tinygrad.org/#tinybox
